text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shrine is packed with people making their
first visit of the new year. Among the crowd, I
spot a particular group of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right, has everyone drawn a fortune? Don't
open them until the count of three, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Phew... I wonder what's in store for me this year.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Not like it matters—most people will have
forgotten what's written on their fortune slips by
the time the holidays are over.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it won't do to let a fortune hold too much
sway, but I do think it's an opportunity to try and
live your life as positively as possible.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Eurgh... I've got to admit, my knees are feel'n
pretty jittery! What if I end up drawing an unlucky
fortune?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna find out one way or the other, so
why don't we make a little game out of this?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
How 'bout the one who draws the worst fortune
gets treated to everything today? If you think
about it that way, they're the luckiest of us!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, I think I could live with a bad fortune if we
did that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what an interesting proposition. All right,
let's open our fortunes then!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: One... two... three!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh my! "Great Fortune!"

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: For real?! Me too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I also got "Great Fortune!"

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Lady Luck's being real generous. I got the same
thing.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo! Talk about a dramatic turn! I got "Great
Fortune" too!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So did I... I wonder what the odds are for
something like this.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Maybe the shrine printed only "Great
Fortune" slips just for the new year?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...You have to be kidding.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Surely you at least drew "Good Fortune" or
"Modest Fortune," right?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah. "Misfortune."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's the gal gunning for best racer in Japan for
ya! You sure know how to land a punchline, Spe!
Bravo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Urk...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Aw, c'mon! You got the first laugh of the new
year! And once we hit the shops, you won't have
to take out your wallet even once. You're the
luckiest of lucky duckies!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that day, I see Special Week laden with
armfuls of food, munching happily away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today more than ever, I keenly feel how
important it is for an Umamusume to have the
support of her friends and trainer.
